rationale: China arresting a US academic is a fresh bilateral friction point; Iran deal diplomacy and UAE fund unlock continue as background; SpaceX IPO is a notable market event.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for espionage
top_events.summary: A fresh escalation in US-China tensions as Beijing detains an American academic, raising concerns about safety of US citizens traveling to China and bilateral relations.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Incremental diplomatic progress on Iran continues; US congressional pushback signals domestic political friction over any Iran deal, with oil market implications.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
top_events.summary: SpaceX's stock market debut is a notable US financial market event, though its direct impact on average Americans' daily lives remains limited.
